issue.title: WPHX-315.07 — Close admin common list-table domain evidence

command: domain closure audit over WPHX-315.01 through WPHX-315.06 receipts
artifact_scope: mixed: source_inventory, adapter_contract, oracle_source_mirror, upstream_suite_parity, packaged_distribution

artifacts.role: admin common/list-table source, distribution, ABI, upstream test, handoff, and fixture surface inventory
typed Haxe admin common/list-table adapter-contract evidence
deterministic admin request, WP_Screen, WP_List_Table, nonce, capability, and output-fragment oracle-source-mirror evidence
deterministic admin menu/submenu, notice, common output, update count, and notice-template oracle-source-mirror evidence
selected upstream admin common/list-table PHPUnit pass/pass ratchet scope plus blocked e2e flow declarations and typed HXX/HHX direction
admin common/list-table package-topology and deterministic bridge-router observation evidence

fixtures_cover: admin bootstrap/chrome, current screen/help/options, menus/navigation, list-table base/specializations, dashboard/site-health, privacy tools, import/export, plugin admin helpers, links/bookmarks, admin asset loading, and filesystem/update handoffs
typed adapter-contract intent for admin request/bootstrap routing, screen setup, list-table routing, menu/submenu registration, notices, capability/nonce/hook guards, and output phases

copied-oracle/candidate admin request, current-screen, WP_Screen help/options, WP_List_Table columns/hidden/sortable/primary metadata, current actions, pagination, row actions, nonce/tablenav/output fragments, and guard observations

copied-oracle/candidate top-level menu and submenu registration/order/no-priv tracking, menu URL/parent/title/access/removal branches, admin notice markup/output filters, viewport/canonical/color output, update count aggregation, and notice JavaScript templates
selected upstream admin common/list-table PHPUnit groups with vanilla pass / candidate pass classifications and selected e2e flows blocked until an installed admin e2e runner exists

package-topology and deterministic bridge-router observations for selected admin package boundary, dashboard chrome/current screen/menu/notices/update counts, edit-posts list-table columns/actions/pagination/output fragments, menu/notice/common output, bulk guard intent, privacy export list-table handoff, and update-core notice-template paths without claiming mirrored upstream route-file execution
remaining_gaps: Generated public PHP replacement for admin common/list-table original paths is not claimed; current copied public PHP and deterministic routers remain bridge evidence where noted.
Full WP_Screen, WP_List_Table, WP_Posts_List_Table, privacy list-table, dashboard, admin header/footer, screen-meta, plugin page, and update-core runtime ownership is not claimed.

Real user/session/capability/nonce behavior, persistent database-backed admin state, feature-screen behavior, admin Ajax, admin browser/e2e execution, and complete installed wp-admin parity remain later work.

Selected WPHX-315 upstream PHPUnit groups classify vanilla pass / candidate pass, but complete upstream admin suite parity is not claimed and selected e2e flows remain blocked until an installed admin e2e runner exists.
Typed HXX/HHX admin PHP/HTML template compilation remains future work tracked by wordpresshx-u87c / WPHX-315.08; WPHX-315 only records the direction and non-claim.

WPHX-315.06 contributes package-topology and bridge-router observation evidence only; it must not be used as precedent that copied upstream PHP plus deterministic router PHP is an acceptable durable implementation path for future admin or template-heavy domains.
Bridge-router durable-claim and generated-overlay validator guardrails remain future work tracked by wordpresshx-fyqs / WPHX-315.09.

Cross-domain admin feature screens, management state, media/upload list tables, updates/installers, multisite admin, and default theme PHP remain WPHX-316, WPHX-313, WPHX-319, WPHX-317, WPHX-320, or later distribution work.
This closes the bounded WPHX-315 admin common/list-table evidence slice, not all WordPress admin behavior or complete ecosystem parity.
